title: webpage-factory Project Documentation
description: A self-contained Sesi project designed for programmatically compiling responsive HTML pages, data reports, and visual charts.
summary: The webpage-factory project provides a comprehensive suite of Sesi modules for building static web content without client-side JavaScript. It includes tools for site construction, markdown parsing, SVG-based data visualization, and CSV data analysis. Additionally, it features a flat-file JSON database engine for persistent storage and management. The project is managed via a CLI that supports compilation, linting, and file encryption tasks.

code_examples.description: Import and use a site-builder function
code_examples.code:
import { generate_page } from "site-builder"; generate_page("My Title", "

Hello World

");

key_rules: All visual charts are rendered as pure HTML/CSS/SVG with zero client-side JavaScript.
The project utilizes a custom Sesi interpreter and CLI for all compilation and execution tasks.
Database operations are performed using a flat-file JSON storage engine.
The site-builder module provides functions for generating responsive layouts such as bento grids, accordions, and modals.
